---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

```{r bodyclocks_setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = normalizePath(".."))
source(file.path("..", "R", "io_utils.R"))
source(file.path("..", "R", "annotation_utils.R"))
source(file.path("..", "R", "biomart_utils.R"))
source(file.path("..", "R", "string_utils.R"))
source(file.path("..", "R", "validation_utils.R"))
ensure_dir(file.path("..", "results", "tables"))
ensure_dir(file.path("..", "results", "reports"))
ensure_dir(file.path("..", "results", "shiny_data", "mouse"))
ensure_dir(file.path("..", "results", "shiny_data", "baboon"))
```


```{r libraries}
library(sva)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(DESeq2)
library(ggplot2)
library(rain)
library(biomaRt)
library(httr)
library(jsonlite)
library(STRINGdb)
```

```{r load_data_run_rain}
tendon <- read.csv("data/raw/tendon.csv")
tendon_rain <- tendon[, c(1, 3:26)]
col_names <- c( "ENSEMBL", "t1r1",
"t2r1",
"t3r1",
"t4r1",
"t5r1",
"t6r1",
"t1r2",
"t2r2",
"t3r2",
"t4r2",
"t5r2",
"t6r2",
"t1r3",
"t2r3",
"t3r3",
"t4r3",
"t5r3",
"t6r3",
"t1r4",
"t2r4",
"t3r4",
"t4r4",
"t5r4",
"t6r4"
)
tendon_rain <- setNames(tendon_rain, col_names)
tendon_rain <- tendon_rain[, order(colnames(tendon_rain))]
duplicates <- tendon_rain$ENSEMBL[duplicated(tendon_rain$ENSEMBL) | duplicated(tendon_rain$ENSEMBL, fromLast = TRUE)]
duplicates_df <- tendon[tendon$ENSEMBL %in% duplicates, c("ENSEMBL", "Symbol")]
tendon_rain_filtered <- tendon_rain[!tendon_rain$ENSEMBL %in% duplicates, ]

rownames(tendon_rain_filtered) <- tendon_rain_filtered$ENSEMBL
tendon_rain_filtered <- tendon_rain_filtered[, -1]



RAIN <- rain(t(tendon_rain_filtered), deltat=4, period=24, measure.sequence = c(4,4,4,4,4,4),
                peak.border=c(0.3, 0.7), method = "independent", adjp.method='ABH', verbose=TRUE) # independent for mouse sampling, longitudinal can be used for cell culture

p_values <- RAIN$pVal

RAIN$BH.Q <- p.adjust(p_values, method = "BH")
RAIN$ENSEMBL <- row.names(RAIN)

tendon_filtered <- tendon[!tendon$ENSEMBL %in% duplicates, ]

# merge  RAIN  by row names with tendon_filtered  by ensemble ID
analysed <- merge(tendon_filtered, RAIN, by.x = "ENSEMBL", by.y = "ENSEMBL", all.x = TRUE)
```


```{r prepare_timeseries_data}
# Table for plotting
df <- subset(analysed, select = -c(ENSEMBL, pVal, phase, peak.shape, period, BH.Q))
col_names2 <- c("Gene", "01", "02", "03", "04", "05", "06", "07", "08", "09", "10", "11", "12", "01", "02", "03", "04", "05", "06", "07", "08", "09", "10", "11", "12")
colnames(df) <- col_names2
data <- pivot_longer(df, cols = !Gene, names_to = "time_point", values_to = "reads")

qval_df <- analysed[c("Symbol", "BH.Q")]
new_pval_names <- c("Gene", "BH.Q")
colnames(qval_df) <- new_pval_names

data <- data[order(data$time_point),]

mean_data <- aggregate(reads ~ Gene + time_point, data, mean)
sd_data <- aggregate(reads ~ Gene + time_point, data, sd)
mean_sd <- merge(mean_data, sd_data, by = c("Gene", "time_point"))
names <- c("Gene", "time_point", "mean", "sd")
colnames(mean_sd) <- names
mean_sd <- inner_join(mean_sd, qval_df, by = "Gene")
save_rds_checked(mean_sd, "results/shiny_data/mouse/tendon/tendon_data.rds")
```

## App RDS processing (from circ_tendon_timecourse_bodyclocks.rmd)

```{r annotate_genes_prepare_string_nodes}
# Load RAIN output merged with source data.
data <- analysed

# Set up the Ensembl BioMart connection
ensembl <- connect_biomart("mmusculus_gene_ensembl")

# Query Ensembl BioMart to get gene descriptions
gene_info <- get_biomart_annotation(
  ids = data$ENSEMBL,
  mart = ensembl,
  attributes = c("ensembl_gene_id", "mgi_symbol", "external_gene_name", "description"),
  filters = "ensembl_gene_id",
  cache_key = "tendon_gene_info"
)

# Prioritize MGI symbols, fall back to external_gene_name only if needed
gene_info <- gene_info %>%
  mutate(preferred_symbol = ifelse(!is.na(mgi_symbol) & mgi_symbol != "", 
                                  mgi_symbol, 
                                  external_gene_name))

# Ensure unique entries in gene_info
gene_info <- gene_info[!duplicated(gene_info$preferred_symbol), ]
gene_info <- gene_info[!duplicated(gene_info$ensembl_gene_id), ]

# Remove text within square brackets, including the brackets themselves
gene_info$description <- gsub("\\[.*?\\]", "", gene_info$description)

# Trim any trailing whitespace that might be left
gene_info$description <- trimws(gene_info$description)


merged <- merge(data, gene_info, by.x = "ENSEMBL", by.y = "ensembl_gene_id", all.x = TRUE)
# If preffered_symbol is NA, copy gene_name to preferred_symbol
merged$preferred_symbol <- ifelse(is.na(merged$preferred_symbol) | merged$preferred_symbol == "", 
                                   merged$Symbol, 
                                   merged$preferred_symbol)
write.csv(merged, "results/tables/tendon_circ.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# Get STRING DB interaction data and functional enrichment

nodes_data <- merged %>%
    filter(BH.Q <= 0.05) %>%
    dplyr::rename(symbol = preferred_symbol)


# ENSEMBL gene IDs return more results than MGI symbols
gene_list <- nodes_data$ENSEMBL
enrichment_background_genes <- unique(RAIN$ENSEMBL)
```

```{r prepare_gene_mapping}
# Create comprehensive gene mapping dictionary
gene_mapping <- create_gene_mapping(
  gene_ids = merged$ENSEMBL,
  symbols = nodes_data$symbol
)

cat("Created mapping for", length(gene_mapping), "genes\n")
```


```{r build_string_network}
# Get protein-protein interactions and enrichment data using STRINGdb

enrichment_backgrounds <- get_string_enrichment_backgrounds(
  foreground_genes = gene_list,
  tested_genes = enrichment_background_genes,
  species_id = 10090
)

network_bundle <- get_string_network_bundle(
  gene_list = gene_list,
  gene_mapping = gene_mapping,
  species_id = 10090,
  nodes_data = nodes_data,
  include_enrichment = FALSE
)
edges <- network_bundle$edges_by_threshold
cluster_data <- enrichment_backgrounds$backgrounds$all_string$cluster_data


phase_colors <- c("4" = "orange", "8" = "yellow", "12" = "red", "16" = "purple", "20" = "navy", "24" = "lightblue")

network_outputs <- build_string_network_outputs(
  cluster_data = cluster_data,
  nodes_data = nodes_data,
  gene_info = gene_info,
  gene_mapping = gene_mapping,
  phase_colors = phase_colors)
enrichment_background_bundle <- build_string_enrichment_background_bundle(
  enrichment_backgrounds, nodes_data, gene_info, gene_mapping, phase_colors
)

cluster_data <- network_outputs$cluster_data
nodes <- network_outputs$nodes
nodes_with_tooltips <- network_outputs$nodes_with_tooltips
cluster_for_plot <- network_outputs$cluster_for_plot
cluster_descriptions <- network_outputs$cluster_descriptions

save_string_network_outputs(
  outputs = network_outputs,
  edges = edges,
  output_dir = "results/shiny_data/mouse/tendon",
  prefix = "tendon"
)
save_string_enrichment_background_bundle(
  enrichment_background_bundle,
  output_dir = "results/shiny_data/mouse/tendon",
  prefix = "tendon"
)

```


```{r compute_amplitude_display_table}
# Process data frame for plotting in bodyclocks shiny app

df <- subset(merged, select = -c(ENSEMBL, Symbol, mgi_symbol, external_gene_name, description, pVal, phase, peak.shape, period, BH.Q))
col_names2 <- c("01", "02", "03", "04", "05", "06", "07", "08", "09", "10", "11", "12", "01.1", "02.1", "03.1", "04.1", "05.1", "06.1", "07.1", "08.1", "09.1", "10.1", "11.1", "12.1", "Gene")
colnames(df) <- col_names2

dt <- df %>%
  mutate(ZT4 = rowMeans(dplyr::select(., c("01", "07", "01.1", "07.1"))),
         ZT8 = rowMeans(dplyr::select(., c("02", "08", "02.1", "08.1"))),
         ZT12 = rowMeans(dplyr::select(., c("03", "09", "03.1", "09.1"))),
         ZT16 = rowMeans(dplyr::select(., c("04", "10", "04.1", "10.1"))),
         ZT20 = rowMeans(dplyr::select(., c("05", "11", "05.1", "11.1"))),
         ZT24 = rowMeans(dplyr::select(., c("06", "12", "06.1", "12.1")))
  )

means <- dt[c("ZT4", "ZT8", "ZT12", "ZT16", "ZT20", "ZT24")]

min_val <- apply(means, 1, min)
max_val <- apply(means, 1, max)

Amp_fc_log2 <- max_val - min_val
Amp_fc <- max_val / min_val

dt <- cbind(merged, Amp_fc_log2, Amp_fc)

display_dt <- dt %>%
  dplyr::select(preferred_symbol, description, pVal, BH.Q, Amp_fc_log2, phase) %>%
  dplyr::rename(symbol = preferred_symbol) %>% #gene names have to be in column labeled symbol
  arrange(BH.Q)

save_rds_checked(display_dt, "results/shiny_data/mouse/tendon/tendon_display_dt.rds")
```



```{r prepare_timeseries_data_full}
df <- subset(merged, select = -c(ENSEMBL, Symbol, mgi_symbol, external_gene_name, description, pVal, phase, peak.shape, period, BH.Q))
col_names2 <- c("01", "02", "03", "04", "05", "06", "07", "08", "09", "10", "11", "12", "01", "02", "03", "04", "05", "06", "07", "08", "09", "10", "11", "12", "Gene")
colnames(df) <- col_names2
data <- pivot_longer(df, cols = !Gene, names_to = "time_point", values_to = "reads")

qval_df <- merged[c("Symbol", "BH.Q")]
new_pval_names <- c("Gene", "BH.Q")
colnames(qval_df) <- new_pval_names

data <- data[order(data$time_point),]

mean_data <- aggregate(reads ~ Gene + time_point, data, mean)
sd_data <- aggregate(reads ~ Gene + time_point, data, sd)
mean_sd <- merge(mean_data, sd_data, by = c("Gene", "time_point"))
names <- c("Gene", "time_point", "mean", "sd")
colnames(mean_sd) <- names
mean_sd <- inner_join(mean_sd, qval_df, by = "Gene")
save_rds_checked(mean_sd, "results/shiny_data/mouse/tendon/tendon_data.rds")
```
